followup_auto.action: Run one bounded OpenClaw fetch for ALLOCATION-FAMILY, then apply the next ALLO-only graph-demotion batch from the reviewed set.
Run the smallest scoped hygiene refresh for 00-Meta\scarcity only, focused on duplicate-title pressure and top-risk validation.

followup_human.decision_needed: Decide whether to adjust Gold scoring thresholds or intake policy in response to council_repeat and zero recent promotions.

stop_trigger: Stop automatic expansion if the ALLOCATION-FAMILY fetch widens beyond the reviewed bounded set, if Gold freshness flips to not ready, or if launcher/OpenClaw health turns unhealthy.
next_anchor: Anchor on the reviewed ALLOCATION-FAMILY graph-demotion batch first; after that, anchor on the scoped 00-Meta\scarcity hygiene refresh.
